title: Orbital FounderNeedsProfile
description: A founder's self-described situation, consumed by the deterministic matching engine (Stream 5). Every field is OPTIONAL: an absent field imposes no constraint and contributes no score, so a partial profile is valid. Enum-valued fields reference the canonical Orbital taxonomy (see /api/program-types.json).

stage.description: Current founder stage (founderStage taxonomy ID). Guided-intake Q1.

location.description: Where the founder is based today (country string, matched loosely).

willingToRelocate.description: Willing to physically relocate for a program. Guided-intake Q5.

preferredRegions.description: Preferred regions / ecosystems, matched against a program's country, region and ecosystem (case-insensitive substring). Guided-intake Q6.

sector.description: Sector / industry focus (e.g. "AI", "climate"), matched against sectorFocus + focus.

teamStatus.description: Solo, in a team, or actively seeking a co-founder. Guided-intake Q2.

fundingNeed.description: Whether the founder needs funding / capital.

equityTolerance.description: Equity tolerance (Q8). 'equity-free-only' disqualifies equity programs; 'prefer-equity-free' is a soft signal.

supportNeeds.description: Concrete support modes the founder wants (supportMode taxonomy IDs). Guided-intake Q3/Q4.

visaNeed.description: Whether the founder needs visa / relocation support to participate.

urgency.description: How soon the founder wants to act (Q7). 'apply-now' makes a closed/unknown status a hard blocker; 'exploring' makes it only a caution.
